title: Lush Cave Ruins
description: An underground archeology structure for lush caves
body:
![A building made out of mud bricks and terracotta in a lush cave. The text "Lush Cave Ruins By Braytonk" is superimposed on the image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2ca1b3820b6a66326e2b53599943f736f43e0b4.png)
## Braytonk's Lush Cave Ruins
This datapack adds an underground archeology-focused structure to lush caves. It is designed to be vanilla-friendly and has the following key features

- Some rooms are buried and must be excavated to reveal more of the structure
- Drainage pipes, which can occasionally be completely filled with water
- Loot includes assorted common items, sherds, armor trims, and the relic music disc
- A small surface feature made of mud-brick that marks where the structure is

The structure can be found underground in lush caves, and can be located via the command `/locate structure keeb_struc_lush:keeb_struc_lush`

There is also another datapack that adds a custom mob to this structure: https://modrinth.com/datapack/lush-cave-bramble
